items.title: 7月17日 GitHub趋势日榜
items.summary: 7月17日 GitHub趋势日榜，Top 10 项目涵盖 Python、CSS、TypeScript 等，今日社区最受关注的开源项目。
items.detail:
apache/ossie - Apache Ossie, industry wide specification effort to standardize how we exchange semantic metadata across analytics, AI and BI platforms, providing a vendor neutral, single source of truth for semantic data
Nutlope/hallmark - Anti-AI-slop design skill for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.
OpenCut-app/OpenCut - The open-source CapCut alternative
PostHog/posthog - 🦔 PostHog is the leading platform for building self-driving products. Our developer tools – AI observability, analytics, session replay, flags, experiments, error tracking, logs, and more – capture all the context agents need to diagnose problems, uncover opportunities, and ship fixes. Steer it all from Slack, web, desktop, or the MCP.
openinterpreter/openinterpreter - A coding agent for open models like Kimi K3
PrismML-Eng/Bonsai-demo - Bonsai Demo
hasaneyldrm/exercises-dataset - 1,324-exercise fitness dataset — animation GIFs, 180×180 thumbnails, muscle-group & equipment data, and step-by-step instructions in 6 languages. The exercise data layer behind the LogPress app.
Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps - 100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.
lobehub/lobehub - 🤯 LobeHub is your Chief Agent Operator, organizing your agents into 7×24 operations by hiring, scheduling, and reporting on your entire AI team.
YimMenu/YimMenuV2 - Experimental menu for GTA 5: Enhanced

repos.name: apache/ossie
repos.description: Apache Ossie, industry wide specification effort to standardize how we exchange semantic metadata across analytics, AI and BI platforms, providing a vendor neutral, single source of truth for semantic data
repos.chinese_summary: Apache Ossie 是一个开源语义模型交换规范，使用 JSON/YAML 在分析、AI 和 BI 工具之间统一传递语义元数据。
repos.solves_what: 它解决不同数据工具对同一指标和业务定义各自为政的问题，帮助团队建立跨平台一致、厂商中立的语义单一事实源。

repos.name: Nutlope/hallmark
repos.description: Anti-AI-slop design skill for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.
repos.chinese_summary: Hallmark 是面向 Claude Code、Cursor 和 Codex 的设计技能，能为不同需求生成风格差异明显、避免“AI 味”的界面。
repos.solves_what: 它解决 AI 生成网页和 UI 容易模板化、同质化的问题，通过主题、结构和自检规则提升设计质感与辨识度。

repos.name: OpenCut-app/OpenCut
repos.description: The open-source CapCut alternative
repos.chinese_summary: OpenCut 是一个面向网页、桌面和移动端的开源视频编辑器，定位为 CapCut 的自由替代方案，并正重写为统一 Rust 核心架构。
repos.solves_what: 它解决创作者缺少免费开源跨平台剪辑工具的问题，减少对封闭商业视频编辑软件的依赖。

repos.name: PostHog/posthog
repos.description: 🦔 PostHog is the leading platform for building self-driving products. Our developer tools – AI observability, analytics, session replay, flags, experiments, error tracking, logs, and more – capture all the context agents need to diagnose problems, uncover opportunities, and ship fixes. Steer it all from Slack, web, desktop, or the MCP.
repos.chinese_summary: PostHog 是一体化产品开发平台，集成分析、会话回放、功能开关、实验、错误追踪、日志和 AI 辅助能力。
repos.solves_what: 它解决产品数据、调试信息和实验工具分散在多套系统中的问题，帮助团队更快定位问题、验证功能并迭代产品。

repos.name: openinterpreter/openinterpreter
repos.description: A coding agent for open models like Kimi K3
repos.chinese_summary: Open Interpreter 是兼容 Codex 工作方式的开源编程代理，面向 Kimi K3 等开放模型，支持命令执行、沙箱和多种 agent harness。
repos.solves_what: 它解决低成本或开放模型难以直接获得成熟编程代理体验的问题，让开发者能用更便宜的模型完成代码与终端任务。

repos.name: PrismML-Eng/Bonsai-demo
repos.description: Bonsai Demo
repos.chinese_summary: Bonsai Demo 用于在本地运行 Bonsai 与 Ternary-Bonsai 模型，支持文本、视觉、工具调用，并覆盖 Mac、Linux、Windows 和 CPU。
repos.solves_what: 它解决本地部署小体积、多平台语言模型流程复杂的问题，让用户更容易体验视觉、多工具和长上下文能力。

repos.name: hasaneyldrm/exercises-dataset
repos.description: 1,324-exercise fitness dataset — animation GIFs, 180×180 thumbnails, muscle-group & equipment data, and step-by-step instructions in 6 languages. The exercise data layer behind the LogPress app.
repos.chinese_summary: 这是一个包含 1324 个健身动作的数据集，提供 GIF、缩略图、器械与肌群信息，以及 10 种语言的分步说明。
repos.solves_what: 它解决健身应用、研究或推荐系统缺少结构化动作数据和配套多语言素材的问题，方便直接接入产品或原型。

repos.name: Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps
repos.description: 100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.
repos.chinese_summary: Awesome LLM Apps 收录 100 多个可直接运行的 AI Agent、技能和 RAG 应用示例，支持克隆、改造和部署。
repos.solves_what: 它解决开发者学习 LLM 应用时缺少现成可运行案例的问题，降低从想法到原型落地的门槛。

repos.name: lobehub/lobehub
repos.description: 🤯 LobeHub is your Chief Agent Operator, organizing your agents into 7×24 operations by hiring, scheduling, and reporting on your entire AI team.
repos.chinese_summary: LobeHub 是一个“Chief Agent Operator”平台，用于统一创建、调度、协作和管理个人或团队的 AI 代理。
repos.solves_what: 它解决多代理工作流分散、上下文割裂和人工切换繁琐的问题，让用户在一个系统中组织长期运行的 AI 团队。

repos.name: YimMenu/YimMenuV2
repos.description: Experimental menu for GTA 5: Enhanced
repos.chinese_summary: YimMenuV2 是面向 GTA 5 Enhanced 的实验性菜单项目，提供 DLL 注入后的游戏内菜单功能。
repos.solves_what: 它主要为需要在 GTA 5 Enhanced 中调用额外菜单功能的用户提供实现方案，降低自行编译和集成此类菜单工具的门槛。

items.title: 7月16日 GitHub趋势日榜
items.summary: 7月16日 GitHub趋势日榜，Top 10 项目涵盖 TypeScript、CSS、Shell 等，今日社区最受关注的开源项目。
items.detail:
OpenCut-app/OpenCut - The open-source CapCut alternative
Nutlope/hallmark - Anti-AI-slop design skill for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.
mattpocock/skills - Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.
moeru-ai/airi - 💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.
Dicklesworthstone/destructive_command_guard - The Destructive Command Guard (dcg) is for blocking dangerous git and shell commands from being executed by agents.
HKUDS/Vibe-Trading - "Vibe-Trading: Your Personal Trading Agent"
openinterpreter/openinterpreter - A coding agent for low-cost models
HKUDS/DeepTutor - DeepTutor: Lifelong Personalized Tutoring. https://deeptutor.info/.
HenryNdubuaku/maths-cs-ai-compendium - Become a cracked AI/ML Research Engineer
Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps - 100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.

repos.name: OpenCut-app/OpenCut
repos.description: The open-source CapCut alternative
repos.chinese_summary: 开源视频编辑器，定位为 CapCut（剪映国际版）的免费替代方案，支持时间线编辑、特效和导出。
repos.solves_what: 解决视频剪辑工具被商业产品垄断、免费开源替代品匮乏的问题，让创作者无需订阅即可完成基础视频编辑。

repos.name: Nutlope/hallmark
repos.description: Anti-AI-slop design skill for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.
repos.chinese_summary: 面向 Claude Code、Cursor 和 Codex 的设计技能包，帮助 AI 编程工具生成更美观的 UI 设计。
repos.solves_what: 解决 AI 生成代码时界面设计粗糙、千篇一律的「AI 味」问题，通过设计约束让输出更接近专业水准。

repos.name: mattpocock/skills
repos.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.
repos.chinese_summary: 面向工程师的 .claude 目录技能集，提供经过实战验证的 Claude Code 工作流和最佳实践。
repos.solves_what: 解决 Claude Code 使用中缺乏标准化工作流的问题，让工程师能快速复用高效的 AI 编程模式。

repos.name: moeru-ai/airi
repos.description: 💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.
repos.chinese_summary: 自托管的 AI 伴侣项目，支持实时语音对话和 Minecraft、Factorio 等游戏交互，灵感来自 Neuro-sama。
repos.solves_what: 解决现有 AI 助手缺乏个性化和实时交互能力的问题，让用户拥有可自定义的、具人格特征的 AI 伴侣。

repos.name: Dicklesworthstone/destructive_command_guard
repos.description: The Destructive Command Guard (dcg) is for blocking dangerous git and shell commands from being executed by agents.
repos.chinese_summary: 安全防护工具，用于拦截 AI 编程代理执行危险的 git 和 shell 命令，防止误操作导致数据丢失。
repos.solves_what: 解决 AI 编程代理在自主执行命令时可能误删代码库、强制推送或执行破坏性操作的安全隐患。

repos.name: HKUDS/Vibe-Trading
repos.description: "Vibe-Trading: Your Personal Trading Agent"
repos.chinese_summary: 基于 AI 的个人交易代理，帮助用户分析市场数据并辅助做出交易决策。
repos.solves_what: 解决个人投资者缺乏专业量化分析工具的问题，用 AI 代理降低金融交易的技术门槛。

repos.name: openinterpreter/openinterpreter
repos.description: A coding agent for low-cost models
repos.chinese_summary: 面向低成本模型的编程代理框架，支持本地运行的 LLM 执行代码、操作文件和完成开发任务。
repos.solves_what: 解决现有编程代理依赖昂贵的云端大模型的问题，让预算有限的开发者也能使用 AI 编程助手。

repos.name: HKUDS/DeepTutor
repos.description: DeepTutor: Lifelong Personalized Tutoring. https://deeptutor.info/.
repos.chinese_summary: 终身个性化辅导系统，根据学生的学习进度和知识薄弱点提供自适应教学内容。
repos.solves_what: 解决传统在线教育「千人一面」的问题，通过 AI 实现真正个性化的学习路径和实时答疑。

repos.name: HenryNdubuaku/maths-cs-ai-compendium
repos.description: Become a cracked AI/ML Research Engineer
repos.chinese_summary: AI/ML 研究工程师的数学与计算机科学速查手册，涵盖线性代数、概率论、优化等核心知识。
repos.solves_what: 解决 AI/ML 学习者数学基础分散、缺乏系统性参考材料的问题，提供一站式的知识梳理。

repos.name: Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps
repos.description: 100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.
repos.chinese_summary: 精选 100+ 可直接运行的 AI Agent 和 RAG 应用合集，提供源码和部署指南。
repos.solves_what: 解决开发者学习 LLM 应用开发时缺乏可运行示例的问题，降低从概念到原型的实现门槛。

items.title: 7月15日 GitHub趋势日榜

items.detail:
1c7/chinese-independent-developer - 👩🏿‍💻👨🏾‍💻👩🏼‍💻👨🏽‍💻👩🏻‍💻中国独立开发者项目列表 -- 分享大家都在做什么

repos.description: A simple, lightweight PowerShell script that allows you to remove pre-installed apps, disable telemetry, as well as perform various other changes to declutter and customize your Windows experience. Win11Debloat works for both Windows 10 and Windows 11.
repos.chinese_summary: 轻量级 PowerShell 脚本，一键移除 Windows 11 预装应用、关闭遥测并自定义系统。
repos.solves_what: 帮助用户快速清理 Windows 11 的臃肿预装软件和不必要的后台服务。

repos.description: A simple, lightweight PowerShell script that allows you to remove pre-installed apps, disable telemetry, as well as perform various other changes to declutter and customize your Windows experience. Win11Debloat works for both Windows 10 and Windows 11.
repos.chinese_summary: 轻量级 PowerShell 脚本，一键移除 Windows 10/11 预装应用、禁用遥测数据收集，精简和自定义系统体验。
repos.solves_what: 帮助 Windows 用户快速清理系统臃肿软件和隐私侵入功能，恢复干净流畅的操作体验。

repos.name: Graphify-Labs/graphify
repos.description: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.
repos.chinese_summary: 将代码、文档、SQL 等文件转化为可查询知识图谱的 AI 编程助手技能。
repos.solves_what: 让 AI 编程工具理解整个项目的代码架构和数据关系，提升大型项目开发效率。

repos.name: hasaneyldrm/exercises-dataset
repos.description: 1,324-exercise fitness dataset — animation GIFs, 180×180 thumbnails, muscle-group & equipment data, and step-by-step instructions in 6 languages. The exercise data layer behind the LogPress app.
repos.chinese_summary: 包含 1324 个健身动作的开源数据集，提供 GIF 动画演示、缩略图、目标肌群和器材信息，支持 6 种语言。
repos.solves_what: 为健身类应用开发者提供标准化的运动数据资源，避免从零构建动作数据库的高昂成本。

repos.name: github/spec-kit
repos.description: 💫 Toolkit to help you get started with Spec-Driven Development
repos.chinese_summary: GitHub 官方出品的规范驱动开发工具包，帮助开发者按规范编写代码。
repos.solves_what: 通过规范先行的方式提升代码质量和开发一致性。

repos.name: coreyhaines31/marketingskills
repos.description: Marketing skills for Claude Code and AI agents. CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering.
repos.chinese_summary: 为 Claude Code 等 AI 编程工具提供的营销技能，涵盖 SEO、文案、CRO 等。
repos.solves_what: 让 AI 编程助手具备数字营销能力，辅助增长工程实践。

items.title: 7月13日 GitHub趋势日榜
items.summary: 7月13日 GitHub趋势日榜，Top 10 项目涵盖 Rust、TypeScript、Python 等，今日社区最受关注的开源项目。
items.detail:
Dicklesworthstone/destructive_command_guard - The Destructive Command Guard (dcg) is for blocking dangerous git and shell commands from being executed by agents.
wonderwhy-er/DesktopCommanderMCP - This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities
HKUDS/Vibe-Trading - "Vibe-Trading: Your Personal Trading Agent"
PrefectHQ/prefect - Prefect is a workflow orchestration framework for building resilient data pipelines in Python.
Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps - 100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.
anthropics/claude-cookbooks - A collection of notebooks/recipes showcasing some fun and effective ways of using Claude.
home-assistant/core - 🏡 Open source home automation that puts local control and privacy first.
Crosstalk-Solutions/project-nomad - Project N.O.M.A.D, is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowledge, and AI to keep you informed and empowered—anytime, anywhere.
ColeMurray/background-agents - An open-source background agents coding system
k1tbyte/Wand-Enhancer - Advanced UX and interoperability extension for Wand (WeMod) app

repos.name: Dicklesworthstone/destructive_command_guard
repos.description: The Destructive Command Guard (dcg) is for blocking dangerous git and shell commands from being executed by agents.
repos.chinese_summary: 安全防护工具，用于拦截 AI 编程代理执行危险的 git 和 shell 命令，防止误操作导致数据丢失。
repos.solves_what: 解决 AI 编程代理在自主执行命令时可能误删代码库、强制推送或执行破坏性操作的安全隐患。

repos.name: wonderwhy-er/DesktopCommanderMCP
repos.description: This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities
repos.chinese_summary: 为 Claude 提供终端控制、文件系统搜索和差异编辑能力的 MCP 服务器。
repos.solves_what: 让 Claude 能直接操作终端、搜索文件和编辑代码，无需手动复制粘贴。

repos.name: HKUDS/Vibe-Trading
repos.description: "Vibe-Trading: Your Personal Trading Agent"
repos.chinese_summary: 基于 AI 的个人交易代理，帮助用户分析市场数据并辅助做出交易决策。
repos.solves_what: 解决个人投资者缺乏专业量化分析工具的问题，用 AI 代理降低金融交易的技术门槛。

repos.name: PrefectHQ/prefect
repos.description: Prefect is a workflow orchestration framework for building resilient data pipelines in Python.
repos.chinese_summary: Python 工作流编排框架，用于构建具备容错能力的数据管道。
repos.solves_what: 简化数据管道开发与监控，适合做数据处理课程项目。

repos.name: Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps
repos.description: 100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.
repos.chinese_summary: 精选 100+ 可直接运行的 AI Agent 和 RAG 应用合集，提供源码和部署指南。
repos.solves_what: 解决开发者学习 LLM 应用开发时缺乏可运行示例的问题，降低从概念到原型的实现门槛。

repos.name: anthropics/claude-cookbooks
repos.description: A collection of notebooks/recipes showcasing some fun and effective ways of using Claude.
repos.chinese_summary: Anthropic 官方整理的 Claude 使用示例与 Notebook 配方合集。
repos.solves_what: 提供官方实践范例，帮助快速掌握 Claude API 应用技巧。

repos.name: home-assistant/core
repos.description: 🏡 Open source home automation that puts local control and privacy first.
repos.chinese_summary: 一款优先本地控制与隐私保护的开源智能家居自动化平台，社区活跃。
repos.solves_what: 让你自建智能家居系统避免数据上云，适合 IoT 项目实践。

repos.name: Crosstalk-Solutions/project-nomad
repos.description: Project N.O.M.A.D, is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowledge, and AI to keep you informed and empowered—anytime, anywhere.
repos.chinese_summary: Project N.O.M.A.D 是一台自带工具、知识与 AI 的离线便携生存计算机。
repos.solves_what: 在无网环境下提供生存知识与计算能力，适合极客硬件折腾。

repos.name: ColeMurray/background-agents
repos.description: An open-source background agents coding system
repos.chinese_summary: 一个开源的后台 AI 编程智能体系统，支持后台持续编码任务。
repos.solves_what: 让 AI 在后台持续处理编码任务，学习多代理协作开发。

repos.name: k1tbyte/Wand-Enhancer
repos.description: Advanced UX and interoperability extension for Wand (WeMod) app
repos.chinese_summary: 为 Wand（WeMod）应用提供高级 UX 与互操作能力的扩展工具。
repos.solves_what: 增强游戏修改器 Wand 的交互能力，方便游戏模组开发。

items.title: 7月第2周 GitHub趋势周榜
items.summary: 7月第2周 GitHub趋势周榜，Top 10 项目涵盖 Rust、TypeScript、JavaScript 等，本周社区最受关注的开源项目。
items.detail:
Zackriya-Solutions/meetily - Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (Meetly Ai - https://meetily.ai) is the #1 Self-hosted, Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows. Understand How to write meeting minutes
wonderwhy-er/DesktopCommanderMCP - This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities
openai/codex-plugin-cc - Use Codex from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks.
TencentCloud/CubeSandbox - Instant, Concurrent, Secure & Lightweight Sandbox for AI Agents.
abseil/abseil-cpp - Abseil Common Libraries (C++)
ogulcancelik/herdr - agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.
asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks - Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT GPT-5.6, Codex GPT-5.6, GPT-5.5. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
diegosouzapw/OmniRoute - Never stop coding. Free AI gateway: one endpoint, 231+ providers (50+ free), connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini. RTK+Caveman stacked compression saves 15-95% tokens, smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A, multimodal APIs, Desktop/PWA.
stablyai/orca - Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.
bradautomates/claude-video - Give Claude the ability to watch any video. /watch downloads, extracts frames, transcribes, hands it all to Claude.

repos.name: Zackriya-Solutions/meetily
repos.description: Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (Meetly Ai - https://meetily.ai) is the #1 Self-hosted, Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows. Understand How to write meeting minutes
repos.chinese_summary: 隐私优先的本地 AI 会议助手，支持实时转写、说话人分离和 Ollama 摘要。
repos.solves_what: 全本地处理会议录音自动生成会议纪要，保护隐私不上云。

repos.name: wonderwhy-er/DesktopCommanderMCP
repos.description: This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities
repos.chinese_summary: 为 Claude 提供终端控制、文件系统搜索和差异编辑能力的 MCP 服务器。
repos.solves_what: 让 Claude 能直接操作终端、搜索文件和编辑代码，无需手动复制粘贴。

repos.name: openai/codex-plugin-cc
repos.description: Use Codex from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks.
repos.chinese_summary: 在 Claude Code 中调用 Codex 进行代码审查或委派任务的官方插件。
repos.solves_what: 在 Claude Code 内打通 Codex 能力，实现多模型协作编程。

repos.name: TencentCloud/CubeSandbox
repos.description: Instant, Concurrent, Secure & Lightweight Sandbox for AI Agents.
repos.chinese_summary: 腾讯云推出的即时、并发、安全的 AI Agent 轻量沙盒环境。
repos.solves_what: 为 AI 代理提供隔离的安全执行环境，防止恶意代码影响主机。

repos.name: abseil/abseil-cpp
repos.description: Abseil Common Libraries (C++)
repos.chinese_summary: Google 开源的 C++ 基础库集合，提供经过实战验证的通用组件。
repos.solves_what: 提供高质量 C++ 基础组件，避免重复造轮子。

repos.name: ogulcancelik/herdr
repos.description: agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.
repos.chinese_summary: 终端中的 AI 代理多路复用器，支持同时管理多个代理会话。
repos.solves_what: 在终端中并行运行和管理多个 AI 编程代理，提升多任务效率。

repos.name: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
repos.description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT GPT-5.6, Codex GPT-5.6, GPT-5.5. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
repos.chinese_summary: 收集整理各大 AI 公司产品的系统提示词泄露合集，持续更新。
repos.solves_what: 了解 AI 产品背后的系统指令设计，学习提示词工程。

repos.name: diegosouzapw/OmniRoute
repos.description: Never stop coding. Free AI gateway: one endpoint, 231+ providers (50+ free), connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini. RTK+Caveman stacked compression saves 15-95% tokens, smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A, multimodal APIs, Desktop/PWA.
repos.chinese_summary: 免费 AI 网关，一个端点接入 231+ 供应商，支持 Claude Code、Codex 等工具。
repos.solves_what: 统一 AI 模型接入入口，降低多模型切换成本，节省 token 开支。

repos.name: stablyai/orca
repos.description: Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.
repos.chinese_summary: Orca 是用于管理并行代理舰队的 ADE，支持桌面和移动端。
repos.solves_what: 让开发者用自有订阅运行和管理多个并行编码代理。

repos.name: bradautomates/claude-video
repos.description: Give Claude the ability to watch any video. /watch downloads, extracts frames, transcribes, hands it all to Claude.
repos.chinese_summary: 让 Claude 能够观看视频的工具，自动下载、提取帧、转写并交给 Claude 分析。
repos.solves_what: 为 Claude 添加视频理解能力，实现视频内容分析和总结。

repos.name: diegosouzapw/OmniRoute
repos.description: Never stop coding. Free AI gateway: one endpoint, 231+ providers (50+ free), connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini. RTK+Caveman stacked compression saves 15-95% tokens, smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A, multimodal APIs, Desktop/PWA.
repos.chinese_summary: 免费 AI 网关，用一个端点接入 231+ 家模型供应商，含 50+ 免费服务。
repos.solves_what: 用免费额度连接 Claude/GPT/Gemini，降低 AI 开发成本。

repos.name: stablyai/orca
repos.description: Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.
repos.chinese_summary: 面向并行智能体舰队的 AI 开发环境（ADE），支持桌面与移动端。
repos.solves_what: 用自己的订阅并行调度多个编程代理，提升开发吞吐量。

repos.name: bradautomates/claude-video
repos.description: Give Claude the ability to watch any video. /watch downloads, extracts frames, transcribes, hands it all to Claude.
repos.chinese_summary: 让 Claude 能观看任意视频的扩展工具，自动下载抽帧并转写。
repos.solves_what: 让 AI 理解视频内容，适合做视频分析与摘要项目。

items.title: 7月 GitHub趋势月榜
items.summary: 7月 GitHub趋势月榜，Top 10 项目涵盖 C、Python、JavaScript 等，本月社区最受关注的开源项目。
items.detail:
DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp - High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.
calesthio/OpenMontage - World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
Panniantong/Agent-Reach - Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks - Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT GPT-5.6, Codex GPT-5.6, GPT-5.5. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
kunchenguid/no-mistakes - git push no-mistakes
usestrix/strix - Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.
ogulcancelik/herdr - agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.
stablyai/orca - Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.
Zackriya-Solutions/meetily - Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (Meetly Ai - https://meetily.ai) is the #1 Self-hosted, Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows. Understand How to write meeting minutes
interviewstreet/hiring-agent - AI agent to evaluate and score resumes.

repos.description: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.
repos.chinese_summary: 高性能代码智能 MCP 服务器，将代码库索引为持久化知识图谱。
repos.solves_what: 毫秒级检索整个代码库，大幅降低 AI 编程助手 token 消耗。
